title: Vivid Serigraph
description: Ce style imite la sérigraphie du milieu du siècle et la lithographie pop-art, se caractérisant par des plans de couleurs très saturées, nets et plats, sans aucun dégradé. Les formes sont entièrement définies par des blocs de couleurs contrastés et des ombres portées noires, dures et dentelées, plutôt que par des contours. Une texture de grain de papier grossier imprègne l'image, donnant aux formes numériques une authenticité tactile d'impression à la main.
description_en: This style emulates vintage mid-century silkscreen printing and pop-art lithography, characterized by stark, flat planes of highly saturated color with zero gradients. Forms are defined entirely by contrasting color blocks and stark, jagged black drop shadows rather than outlines. A distinct, coarse paper grain texture permeates the image, giving the digital vector-like shapes a tactile, hand-printed authenticity.
description_fr: Ce style imite la sérigraphie du milieu du siècle et la lithographie pop-art, se caractérisant par des plans de couleurs très saturées, nets et plats, sans aucun dégradé. Les formes sont entièrement définies par des blocs de couleurs contrastés et des ombres portées noires, dures et dentelées, plutôt que par des contours. Une texture de grain de papier grossier imprègne l'image, donnant aux formes numériques une authenticité tactile d'impression à la main.
prompt: Digital illustration mimicking mid-century silkscreen printing and pop-art serigraphy. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork relies entirely on stark, flat planes of highly saturated color with absolutely zero gradients or soft blending. Forms and structures are defined exclusively by contrasting color blocks and stark, solid black drop shadows rather than traditional line art or outlines. Lighting implies extreme, harsh, direct sunlight, casting absolute hard-edged, pitch-black shadows that anchor the elements. The color palette utilizes vivid, high-contrast, unmixed hues, featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant field, balanced by sharp interventions of {{accent_color}} and expansive stretches of {{secondary_color}}. The entire composition is unified by a distinct, coarse paper grain texture and subtle print noise, simulating the tactile materiality of rough construction paper or vintage lithographic stock. Edges of shapes are slightly jagged and irregular, mimicking hand-cut screen stencils or the slight bleed of ink on porous paper, avoiding perfectly smooth vector curves. Spatial depth is achieved through the rigid layering of flat, overlapping 2D planes rather than atmospheric perspective, creating a striking, graphic flatness. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners.
prompt_removebg: Digital illustration mimicking mid-century silkscreen printing and pop-art serigraphy, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork relies entirely on stark, flat planes of highly saturated color with absolutely zero gradients or soft blending. Forms and structures are defined exclusively by contrasting color blocks and stark, solid black drop shadows rather than traditional line art or outlines. Lighting implies extreme, harsh, direct sunlight, casting absolute hard-edged, pitch-black shadows that anchor the elements. The color palette utilizes vivid, high-contrast, unmixed hues, featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant field, balanced by sharp interventions of {{accent_color}} and expansive stretches of {{secondary_color}}. The entire composition is unified by a distinct, coarse paper grain texture and subtle print noise, simulating the tactile materiality of rough construction paper or vintage lithographic stock. Edges of shapes are slightly jagged and irregular, mimicking hand-cut screen stencils or the slight bleed of ink on porous paper, interacting cleanly with the {{background_color}} backdrop. Elements of the {{subject}} may intentionally overflow and extend beyond the visible frame, cropped naturally by the image boundaries. Spatial depth is achieved through the rigid layering of flat, overlapping 2D planes rather than atmospheric perspective, creating a striking, graphic flatness against the {{background_color}}.
background_prompt: A stark, flat landscape or abstract environmental expanse mimicking vintage silkscreen printing. The scene is constructed from rigid, horizontal bands of unmixed, highly saturated color, primarily utilizing {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with stark highlights of {{accent_color}}. The environment features absolute graphic flatness, zero gradients, and hard-edged, slightly jagged shapes representing distant terrain or sky. A coarse, tactile paper grain texture permeates the entire composition, unified under harsh, implied direct sunlight with deep, solid black cast shadows anchoring any topological features.
background_prompt_removebg: A stark, flat landscape or abstract environmental expanse mimicking vintage silkscreen printing, transitioning seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. The scene is constructed from rigid, horizontal bands of unmixed, highly saturated color, primarily utilizing {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with stark highlights of {{accent_color}}. The environment features absolute graphic flatness, zero gradients, and hard-edged, slightly jagged shapes representing distant terrain or sky. In the foreground, a decorative, jagged stencil-cut border overlay frames the empty central space, casting stark, solid black drop shadows onto the {{background_color}} backdrop. A coarse, tactile paper grain texture permeates the entire composition, unified under harsh, implied direct sunlight.
